programme.title: Gaither Gospel Hour
programme.sub-title: Jimmy Fortune: Songs From an American Dreamer
programme.desc: Jimmy Fortune chronicles his life through performance and interview hosted by Ricky Skaggs and Sharon White; from big dreams in small-town Virginia to decades of hits and three Hall of Fame inductions, he shares his autobiography.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you ever feel like you're just waiting for the next bad thing to happen? Be encouraged! Today, Joyce shares the keys to winning your battles and enjoying life in the process.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Dr. David Jeremiah examines the challenges believers face both externally and internally in their walk of faith.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Matt and Laurie Crouch host Michael A. Youssef.

programme.title: Worship With The Binions and Friends
programme.sub-title: Glory of Eden Album Recording Part 1
programme.desc: David and Nicole Binion host dynamic nights of worship featuring top gospel artists.

programme.title: Jesus: The Game Changer
programme.sub-title: The Least of These: The Story of Krish Kandiah
programme.desc: Karl Faase travels to the U.K., U.S., Singapore, India and Australia, interviewing authors, academics and modern-day game changers about how the life and teaching of Jesus changed the world and why it matters.

programme.title: Stop the Pain: The Six to Fix
programme.desc: Dr. Scott Hannen shares how to unlock the body's potential to heal itself.

programme.title: Why Israel Matters
programme.desc: From Moses and Gideon to King David and Queen Esther, unusual tales of heroism are the trademark of the Jewish people.

programme.title: Praise
